features: STEAM ACTIVATED CHARCOAL - The sponge-like structure of the activated charcoal makes it ideal for absorbing certain liquids and gases in your body, particularly those that cause flatulence. SuperSelf rapid release activated charcoal tablets allow for faster activation in the right area.

PURE, NATURAL, NO ADDITIVES – Made from wild-harvested coconut shells, SuperSelf activated charcoal tablets are 100% pure, with no additives or fillers. Each serving contains 2000mg of activated charcoal, split over 6 capsules. We recommend taking 3 capsules half an hour before a meal and the other 3 after. The package contains 180 activated charcoal capsules.

SHOWN TO REDUCE FLATULENCE – A well-researched natural supplement, activated charcoal is made by steam-activating charcoal, which creates tiny bubbles inside it. Its porous surface binds to unwanted liquids and gases which are then carried away and harmlessly excreted. Active charcoal is harmless and not absorbed into your body.

HIGH QUALITY, EASY TO TAKE – Developed in the UK, SuperSelf Activated Charcoal tablets have quality built-in. The products are manufactured to Good Manufacturing Practice standards and are suitable for vegans and vegetarians. Shop with confidence, knowing that our products are safe.

A BETTER WAY TO SUPPLEMENT – Live your best life, whatever your age, state of health or previous lifestyle. The SuperSelf team create supplements designed to help you live well for longer. A percentage of profits from this purchase will go to Vitamin Angels, reducing preventable diseases in children under the age of five in 70 countries worldwide.
